text.title: Core SaaS Metric Formulas and Antipatterns
text.summary: Precise formulas for all essential SaaS metrics and six common tracking mistakes with fixes.

section.title: Metric Formulas
section.p: MRR = sum of all monthly recurring revenue. ARR = MRR × 12. Churn rate = customers lost in period / customers at start of period. LTV = ARPU / churn rate (in months). CAC = total marketing spend / new customers acquired. LTV:CAC ratio = LTV / CAC (target above 3:1, healthy above 5:1). ARPU = total revenue / total active customers. Net revenue retention = (starting MRR + expansion MRR - churn MRR) / starting MRR (target above 100%).

antipattern.reason: Analysis paralysis: no metric gets the attention needed to drive decisions. Prune to a maximum of 10 with clear owners before adding new metrics.

antipattern.description: No targets set for key metrics.
antipattern.reason: Without targets, green/yellow/red status is undefined. Metrics without targets produce data without accountability, which is equivalent to not measuring at all.

antipattern.description: Stale data from manual reporting with no automation.
antipattern.reason: Stale data produces stale decisions. Revenue and churn alerts that fire 2 weeks late prevent no damage. Automate Stripe → Sheets refresh to at minimum daily cadence.

antipattern.description: Complex dashboards that no one opens.
antipattern.reason: Dashboard complexity directly reduces usage frequency. A simple 8-row table that is reviewed daily beats a 50-widget dashboard that is never opened.
